name: Joan's Cranberry-Orange Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all ingredients except the dried cranberries into the bread machine in the order listed.
2. Set the machine to "light" and "mix bread" (for Hitachi) or an equivalent setting.
3. Add the dried cranberries at the sound of the mixing cycle.
4. Make appropriate adjustments if using a different machine or baking method.
5. This is an excellent holiday bread, both pretty and festive in appearance.
(Note: Recipe sourced from Joan Mershon.)
